subject: Fix Sonar Issues in apex-pdp-basic-model
commit_message:
Fix Sonar Issues in apex-pdp-basic-model

Test refactoring and use of Local-Variable Type Inference

Issue-ID: POLICY-3093
Change-Id: If19c9ec96ba440a58eff679f276e4b53a26ce1ab
Signed-off-by: lapentafd <francesco.lapenta@est.tech>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-apex-pdp-master-verify-java/1587

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

Looks like most of the toString methods could be removed and replaced with the ToString annotation, provided it doesn't break too many junits that expect a particular format.

Likewise, it looks like most of the hashCode & equals methods could be replaced with the EqualsAndHashCode annotation.
